repo.description: MonGPT's marketing site — a statically exported Next.js app on Cloudflare Pages promoting an AI chat + voice support agent localized for Asian markets. It doubles as an SEO engine with 25+ free tools (AI generators, markdown converters, URL utilities) and an 8-language docs hub.
repo.framework: Next.js 16 (static export), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Cloudflare Pages

cards.title: Add security headers and file upload validation
cards.rationale: Demo API endpoints accept unvalidated file uploads and the edge middleware sets zero security headers.
bullets: Validate file size and MIME type before parse-file upload
Cap textarea input length on generator and chat endpoints

cards.title: Add mobile hamburger menu to site header
cards.rationale: Nav links are hidden below md breakpoint with no alternative — mobile visitors lose all navigation.
bullets: Add collapsible drawer toggled below md breakpoint
Reuse existing LocaleSwitcher and CTA in drawer

cards.title: Add unit tests for markdown conversion utilities
cards.rationale: Five pure converter functions in toMarkdown.ts power 7 tool pages with zero test coverage.
bullets: Add vitest and test htmlToMarkdown, csvToMarkdown, jsonToMarkdown
Cover xmlToMarkdown and textToMarkdown edge cases
Test nested HTML, malformed JSON, empty CSV inputs

cards.title: Add competitor comparison pages for SEO capture
cards.rationale: Intercom and Tidio rank page-one for 'Intercom alternative' — MonGPT is invisible there despite a cheaper, multi-language product.
bullets: Build /compare/[slug] pages for Intercom, Tidio, Crisp
Feature-by-feature comparison table with pricing deltas
Add comparison routes to sitemap.ts and footer mesh

cards.title: Add interactive no-signup product demo page
cards.rationale: Visitors cannot try the chatbot without creating an account — the highest-friction point in the funnel.
bullets: New /demo page with pre-loaded sample knowledge base
Embed DemoWidget with sample tenant and guided prompt chips
Show 'Powered by MonGPT' signup CTA after each answer

cards.title: Add WhatsApp Business integration landing page
cards.rationale: WhatsApp is the dominant support channel in MonGPT's target markets (India, Indonesia, Philippines) yet no integration page exists.
bullets: Diagram AI chatbot + WhatsApp Business API flow
Add to sitemap, footer, and Header nav
